title: Amtech U5250 Ball of String for Craft, Home, Garden and Gift Wrap, White, 3 Pieces of 45 metre
features: VERSATILE: Supplied in a pack of 3, this string is ideal to use around the home, for crafts or gift wrapping, or even as garden string
LONG!: Each ball is 45m long, providing 135 metres in total
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools Ltd brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values: Honesty Integrity Trust See More
